title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into Contract for Service of Mr. Joshua G. Sapin As a Para-teacher (LEARNING SUPPORT AIDE) with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Fifteen Thousand Pesos (P 15,000.00) Chargeable Against the Special Education Fund Effective January to December 2022. (AUTHOR : COUNCILWOMAN RODORA P. LOARES, 01/04/22)
